'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 116''' was the one hundred sixteenth of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]''. The issue was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]], [[Abel G. Peña]] and [[Jim Swallow]]. It also featured original artwork by [[Nick Foreman]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*[[Republic 49|The Fall of Quinlan Vos]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]
*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Ventress]]
*[[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]
*[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]
*[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]
*[[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm the Dissolver]]
*[[Diamond-class cruiser/Legends|Commerce Guild Ship]]
